title: [ARCHIVED] The Circle Chicken
description:
[ARCHIVED] The Circle Chicken. Add a circle chicken to your minecraft.
Edit: This was my first mod ever btw!
body:
> Edit: This was my first mod ever btw!
> 
**🐔 The Circle Chicken**

This mod add a **circle chicken** to your minecraft.

**The Circle Chicken** give u a lot of saturation
and **The Circle Chicken** has a lot of damage

you can use it in any stiuation

I'm just making this mod for fun and funny purpose!

**🐔 The Circle Chicken**
